data.name: Controls the display sequence on the dashboard.
data.value: Controls the order in which items appear on the dashboard.

data.name: Gives employees an idea of how long the task might take.
data.value: Gives employees an idea of how long the task might take.

data.name: How to create an onboarding task?
data.value: How to create an onboarding task?

data.name: Onboarding tasks are designed to guide new employees through their first days.
data.value: Onboarding tasks are designed to guide new employees through their first days.

data.name: The URL where the employee will be redirected when they click 'Start Task'.
data.value: The URL where the employee will be redirected when they click 'Start Task'.

data.name: Use Markdown to provide detailed instructions or context.
data.value: Use Markdown to provide detailed instructions or context.
